narrative:
Rossford Ex Vill Sd (Wood) exempted village school district has 9,725 registered voters, with 59.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.8%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.3 percentage points.
